title: UK DL Gen — full document data & card preview
items: Three card revisions: EU (2015–21) with EU circle + Welsh text, 2021–23 post-Brexit pink, 2023+ blue Royal Crest
Full document data block — issue/expiry dates, card serial (Luhn), categories, address (field 8)
Standard 10yr vs Group 2 HGV/Bus 5yr validity with correct date ranges per revision
Generation history — last 10 sessions saved to localStorage with one-click full restore
Random UK address generation from dedicated address pool (uk-dl-addresses.ts)
Fixed issue date ranges: EU cards capped at Jun 2021, 2021–23 cards Jul 2021–Sep 2023
SVG card preview fixed at 350px width — no layout jump on address change
Sidebar UNITED KINGDOM group added

title: MRZ Forge — Manual Intelligence
items: Manual data integrated for 30+ countries — doc number formats, personal number formats, validity periods
Document number generator rewritten per country manuals (DE, FR, ES, BE, HU, FI, LV, CH, AU, IE, BG, RO, SE, EE and more)
📋 INFO overlay — shows doc number format, personal number spec and notes from the manual for selected country
🔤 FONTS overlay — lists exact fonts used in each country's document
✅ MANUAL_VALID badge — validates generated doc number against manual rules after each MRZ generation
📅 Expiry autofill — one-click fills expiry date based on country standard validity (5 or 10 years)
🟢 Manual coverage dots — green indicator in country selector for countries with manual data
Personal number generator expanded to 30+ countries: BSN, PESEL, CPF, NINo, TFN, personnummer, HETU, INSEE, Codice Fiscale, EGN, OIB, EMŠO, AMKA, PPS, Steuer-ID and more
PWA / Offline mode — service worker caches app shell and flag images for 30 days

title: MRZ Forge & Revolut upgrades
items: Country flags in nationality/issuer selector (flagcdn.com, cross-platform)
Two-column layout — input left, MRZ output + history right, no scroll needed
Generation history — last 5 results with one-click field restore
RANDOM and CLEAR buttons for quick data fill
Auto document number generator per country (Europe + USA/CAN/AUS/BRA)
Cyrillic input blocked, all name fields auto-uppercase
SubType warnings for country-specific document variants (DE, AT, CH, GB, US, CA, FR, NL, PL)
Date validation — birth date vs expiry date cross-check
Custom Transaction toggle in Revolut — set merchant, amount, date manually
📡 UPDATES news feed on dashboard
Fixed --text-dim color contrast

title: Initial Release
items: MRZ Forge — universal MRZ generator (TD1, TD2, TD3, MRV-A)
Revolut statement generator with scan mode
AI Bypass — image compression with quality scoring
EXIF Cleaner with GPS map preview
Face Cut tool
Irish NDLS MRZ, Dutch & French MRZ generators
Energia bill generator
Deep links for MRZ Forge
Quick presets & custom preset save in MRZ Forge
